summary: Completed full regression testing for KINETIC Connected Body Phase 1. Both CRITICAL bugs from iteration_1 have been verified as FIXED. Found and fixed one additional bug: bronze node color not applying due to GSAP syntax issue (fill property needed to be inside attr object). All core features now working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅✅✅ CRITICAL FIX 1 VERIFIED: Auto propagation fires automatically ~2.2s after page load with bronze nodes (hsl(28, 28%, 38%)) and typed annotations
✅✅✅ CRITICAL FIX 2 VERIFIED: Prefers-reduced-motion static state displays immediately with 7 bronze nodes in ankle-l chain and annotations visible
Auto propagation repeats on cycle (verified nodes enlarge and annotations appear)
Manual node click triggers bronze propagation correctly
Mid-animation node switching works cleanly without state corruption
Keyboard accessibility: Tab navigation reaches node buttons with visible focus ring
Keyboard activation: Enter key triggers propagation
Skip-to-content link is first focusable element
Desktop header navigation: Approach, Conditions, About links navigate correctly
Desktop Book CTA (nav-book-button) navigates to /booking
Hero Book CTA (hero-book-button) navigates to /booking
Wordmark returns to home page
404 route renders 'This page lost its alignment.' message
404 return link (placeholder-home-link) works correctly
Mobile viewport (390x844): Exactly 5 node buttons visible (ankle-l, knee-r, hip-l, l4, c7)
Mobile hint chip (hero-tap-hint) visible with text 'Tap a point'
Mobile node tap triggers bronze propagation
Mobile hamburger menu button (nav-mobile-menu-button) opens sheet
Mobile sheet (nav-mobile-sheet) displays with nav links and Book CTA
No accessibility warnings about missing Description for DialogContent (SheetDescription fix from previous commit working)
No JavaScript console errors during load, interactions, or navigation
No page errors detected
Breathing animation visible and smooth
Pointer lens effect follows cursor on desktop
Node hover labels display correctly on desktop

success_percentage.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per instructions (template only)
success_percentage.frontend_critical_fixes: 100% - Both critical bugs fixed and verified
